meta.hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json; zero repo/network reads at verdict time; every registered constant below is copied verbatim from the PROPOSAL 071 block / idea file, and every COMMITTED constant was re-verified FIRSTHAND at superbot f8e2313 (read-only shallow fetch of exactly that pin) BEFORE this file was written: weight.py _BASE 0.18 / _EXP 1.65 / _SPREAD_LO 0.65 / _SPREAD_HI 1.55, nominal = round(_BASE * rank**_EXP, 2), roll = max(0.01, round(nominal * r.uniform(0.65, 1.55), 2)); fishing_workflow.py:267 new_best = catch.weight > 0 and (prev_best is None or catch.weight > prev_best) (STRICTLY greater); rewards.py:48 the ONLY roll_weight call site and the line-46 mix law weights = 1.0 / (rank ** (1.0 / pull)); rods.py ROD_LADDER rarity_pull 1.00/1.10/1.25/1.45/1.70; weather.py rarity_mult 1.0/1.0/1.08/1.12/1.30; fish.py FISH_PER_LEVEL 3, MAX_LEVEL 7, band = 3*level clamped; fish.json 21 shore fish ranks 1..21 (rank 1 = minnow) + 11 deepwater rows at ranks 2/4/6/8/10/12/14/16/17/20/21; the 21 pinned nominals reproduce round(0.18*r**1.65, 2) exactly; db/games/fishing.py GREATEST(best_weight, EXCLUDED.best_weight) + the 'prior best is None or strictly less' docstring; the design-doc trophy sentences and the weight.py header sentences verbatim; bait.py/gear.py/venue.py grep 'weight' = 0 hits; n3 display probe: views/fishing/menu.py:106 renders the record as {best:g}kg (6 significant digits - NEVER coarser than the 2-dp storage grid, so the n3 axis stays disarmed at harvest) - ALL MATCHED, zero harvest anomalies

model.weight_law: per catch of rank-r species: W = round(N_r * f, 2) with f ~ U(13/20, 31/20); N_r = the pinned 2-decimal nominal; max(0.01, .) is inert (smallest reachable atom 0.12 at rank 1). Exact model: atom v = k/100 gets p = measure of f with N*f in [(2k-1)/200, (2k+1)/200), clipped to [13/20, 31/20], divided by the span 9/10; rounding-boundary ties are measure zero (half-open convention declared; Arm F is the committed-float honesty row)
model.record_law: STRICT >: first catch of a species is always a PB; a later catch is a PB iff strictly heavier. round(x, 2) yields one deterministic double per grid point so equal displayed weights are equal stored values - strictness is real
model.mix_law: decision cell = bare rod (pull = 1.00), level 7, shore: q_r = (1/r)/H21 exact rationals over ranks 1..21; other committed cells (pull x weather x level) are L1-gated reporting rows using the committed float formula 1.0/(r**(1.0/pull))

theorems.T1: atom census - the support of round(N*f, 2) is a finite set of consecutive 0.01-grid atoms with exact rational probabilities summing to 1; |A_r| ~ 90*N_r + 1
theorems.T2: reachable ceiling - the top atom has strictly positive probability, so the strict-record chase is a.s. finite with E[catches of the species to completion] = 1/p_ceiling; kill-casts at a mix cell = 1/(q_r * p_ceiling)
theorems.T3: terminating-record law - P(atom v_k is ever a record) = p_k / P(X >= v_k), so E[lifetime PBs] = sum_k p_k / S_k is FINITE; P(PB at catch t) = sum_k p_k * F_k^(t-1) with F_k = P(X < v_k), strictly below the continuous 1/t benchmark from t = 2 on
theorems.L1: modal invariance (lemma) - the committed mix weights rank^(-1/pull) are strictly decreasing in rank for every finite pull >= 1 and every level band contains rank 1, so rank 1 (the shortest ladder, 17 atoms) is the modal catch at every committed rod x weather x level cell

committed_constants.nominals_note: pinned verbatim from the registration AND re-verified this session against round(0.18*r**1.65, 2) at the committed formula - the runner re-gates the identity

reject.clause_i: modal species' ladder has <= 20 rungs AND p_ceiling >= 1/50 (chase provably complete in <= 50 catches of the species in expectation), at the decision cell
reject.clause_iii: strict-record law P(PB at t) < 1/t holds for EVERY t in 2..50 (exact rationals)
reject.reading: all three AND-ed; the modal species at the decision cell is rank 1 per L1 (if L1 fails the n1 axis re-keys the census on the true modal species)

decision.invalid: any G1-G6 gate failure (controls misbehaving - reported; per the registered evaluation order REJECT is evaluated FIRST, so a gate failure with REJECT already fired is reported first-class beside the ruling, never silently)

approve.clause_ii: expected completion horizon at the decision-cell mix >= 1000 casts
approve.reading: both AND-ed; mutually exclusive with REJECT by arithmetic

null_axes: n1 mix axis: some committed cell demotes rank 1 from modal (L1 falsified) - census re-keys on the true modal species, tables attached
n2 float-boundary axis: Arm F support mismatch surviving the INVALID gate - the corrected census is the finding
n3 display axis: a render coarser than storage (probed at harvest: menu.py:106 {best:g}kg is NOT coarser - disarmed, disclosed)
n4 theorem failure without gate failure: the corrected law is the finding

disclosed_approve_world.note: the drafter's DISCLOSED horizon; the runner re-derives the 3-dp world exactly and any mismatch is a first-class anomaly (see conventions C10/C12)

gates.G4: T3 - E_life(1) = 11736310749428605/3026966925030048 exactly; geometric-series identity: partial sums E[PBs in n] monotone non-decreasing and E_life - E[PBs in 1000] < 1/1000 (exact Fractions, minnow); P(PB at t) < 1/t STRICT for every t in 2..50 (exact)
gates.G5: hand world - nominal 0.10: exactly 9 atoms, each p = 1/9, E_life = H9 = 7129/2520, E[catches to ceiling] = 9 (both arms)
gates.G6: battery - refinement lemma: rank-1 E_life increments across grid decades 1/100 -> 1/1000 -> 1/10000 each within ln 10 +/- 1/10 (the STRICT per-decade reading, convention C12) and P(PB at t) -> 1/t from below for t in {2, 3, 5} (monotone increasing across grids, each < 1/t, exact); degeneracy: spread collapsed to a point => 1 atom, E_life = 1; E[PBs in n] non-decreasing in n and bounded by both H_n and E_life (minnow, n = 1..1000, exact); L1: committed float mix weights strictly decreasing in rank at every committed pull x weather cell and every level band contains rank 1

arm_f.role: committed-roll fidelity - the committed one-liner re-implemented VERBATIM from the harvested line (float round, random.uniform, max(0.01, .)); support equality with the exact model REQUIRED on ranks {1, 2, 3, 21}; frequencies are a REPORTING row (the drafter's drafting-time freq 0.0249 at the ceiling is the drafter's own draw, not an anchor)

battery.twin: Arm B census is an INDEPENDENTLY-WRITTEN boundary-point sweep (collects every clipped rounding boundary in f-space, sorts, sweeps segments, assigns each segment to the atom of its midpoint - never via Arm A's per-atom interval formula); Arm B record laws run an explicit per-t DP over prefix-CDF partial sums and compute E_life as p_i/(1 - F_i) from ITS OWN prefix sums; exact Fraction equality with Arm A required on every registered rational

conventions.C1: half-open rounding intervals [(2k-1)/200, (2k+1)/200) in real arithmetic; the measure-zero banker's-rounding tie set is disclosed; Arm F is the committed-float honesty row (n2 catches survivors)
conventions.C2: atoms are enumerated ascending; prefix F_i = P(X < v_i) and suffix S_i = P(X >= v_i) are exact Fractions; per-arm independent implementations
conventions.C3: the decision numbers are: |A_1| (rungs), p_ceiling(1), E_life(1), and the exact cadence sequence P(PB at t) t in 2..50 - all at the decision cell with rank 1 as the modal species (L1-gated)
conventions.C4: kill horizon (APPROVE clause ii) = 1/(q1 * p_ceiling(1)) casts at the decision-cell mix; the same identity re-keyed at grid 1/1000 prices the APPROVE world
conventions.C5: band-margin ledger (the V083 margin-ledger lesson applied): the runner publishes the exact margin of EVERY decision clause to its band (rungs 20 - |A_1|; p_ceiling - 1/50; 4 - E_life(1); min over t in 2..50 of 1/t - P(PB at t)) plus the per-species band sweep (which ranks would satisfy each REJECT clause) - and re-verifies no decision clause lands margin-0 (exact zero)
conventions.C6: career table (reporting): E[PB events in n casts] = sum_r sum_i p_i * (1 - (1 - q_r * S_i)^n) / S_i via the exact thinned-record identity, evaluated in floats (n up to 10000 makes exact powers infeasible - disclosed); the continuous benchmark sum_t sum_r (1 - (1 - q_r)^t)/t likewise; float reporting rows are twin-compared at 1e-9 relative, never as exact rationals
conventions.C7: the lifetime total sum_r E_life(r) is computed exactly in memory (twin-gated as a Fraction) and REPORTED as a 12-significant-digit float
conventions.C8: seed discipline: the ONLY random.Random constructors in the runner are the three registered read seeds in pinned order (F, R-main, R-stability); the aux seed 20261633 appears only in this fixture and the never-read assertion (constructor registry counted)
conventions.C9: print discipline (the drafter's disclosed 4300-digit int-print hazard): exact rationals are PRINTED only for ranks 1-3 E_life, the |A|/p_ceiling tables, and the registered small anchors; every other exact value is gated by in-memory Fraction equality and reported as a 12-significant-digit float; no sys.set_int_max_str_digits bump; anomaly messages format big rationals through floats
conventions.C10: disclosed-landing comparison: exact disclosed anchors compared as exact rationals; disclosed-rounded values (career table, lifetime total, benchmark, E_life floats, the APPROVE-world rungs/horizon) compared at stated precision as NEVER-GATED reporting rows (the V082-C10 norm; P071 registered no gate over them) - any mismatch is a named first-class anomaly (A1, A2, ... convention)
conventions.C11: canonical serialization: results.json written with sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=True, indent=2, LF newlines; Fractions serialized as 'p/q' strings only where C9 permits printing
conventions.C12: the G6 refinement band 'ln 10 +/- 1/10 per decade' is applied in the STRICT per-decade reading (each of the two named decade steps separately); the per-two-decade average is published beside it as a reporting row. DISCLOSED BEFORE THE RUNNER: this session's pre-fixture verification (outside the repo, same discipline as the harvest re-verification) already measured the first decade step at ~2.17694 - OUTSIDE the strict band (ln 10 - 2.17694 ~ 0.1256 > 1/10) - and the second at ~2.29981 (inside). The gate will run as registered and its failure will be logged first-class; per the registered evaluation order REJECT is evaluated FIRST, so the ruling is unaffected if REJECT fires on its own exact clauses. The cause is pinned exactly: at 3 dp the support edges 0.117 = N*13/20 and 0.279 = N*31/20 land ON-GRID, restructuring both edge atoms to exact half-cells (2-dp edge cells are 0.8 and 0.4 of interior), a one-time correction; from 3 dp on the edge structure is self-similar and the increment converges to ln 10
conventions.C13: anomaly convention: every mismatch against a disclosed value, every gate failure, and every registered-text ambiguity resolution is a named first-class anomaly row in results.json and stdout - nothing is silently absorbed
